Protein families: Methyltransferase superfamily, tRNA (mnm(5)s(2)U34)-methyltransferase family; DAO family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: In the N-terminal section; belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. tRNA (mnm(5)s(2)U34)-methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01102}.; SIMILARITY: In the C-terminal section; belongs to the DAO family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01102}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=5-aminomethyl-2-thiouridine(34) in tRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylaminomethyl-2-thiouridine(34) in tRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:19569, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10195, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10197, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74454, ChEBI:CHEBI:74455; EC=2.1.1.61; Evidence={ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01102};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the last two steps in the biosynthesis of 5-methylaminomethyl-2-thiouridine (mnm(5)s(2)U) at the wobble position (U34) in tRNA. Catalyzes the FAD-dependent demodification of cmnm(5)s(2)U34 to nm(5)s(2)U34, followed by the transfer of a methyl group from S-adenosyl-L-methionine to nm(5)s(2)U34, to form mnm(5)s(2)U34. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01102}.
